_comment_1: Common Mustache context shared across all 8 patterns. Pattern-specific overrides live in patterns/pN.json's `context` block.
_comment_replicas: For smoke tests we run 1 replica each (user pref 2026-05-12). Skill production default is 3 (configured via SKILL.md A4 Q&A in user runs).
_comment_3: JDBC PostgreSQL per plan-009 D3 (DB backend) + D12 (host Docker container, accessed from pod via host.minikube.internal).
_comment_4: TLS CA paths only used when tlsEnabled=true (p8). Empty defaults are safe under {{#tlsEnabled}} guards.
